EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPointCollection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that manipulate the points of a Multipoint, Path, Ring, Polyline, Polygon, TriangleFan, TriangleStrip, or MultiPatch.

[Guid("DE08A214-4FC2-11D1-834E-0000F8775BE9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPointCollection

Properties

EnumVertices

A new enumerator for this point collection.

IEnumVertex EnumVertices { get; }

Property Value

IEnumVertex

Examples

Sample Snippet

Point[int]

A copy of the ith vertex of a Path, Ring, Polyline, or Polygon; or a reference to the ith point of a Multipoint, TriangleFan, or TriangleStrip.

IPoint Point[int i] { get; }

Parameters

i int

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">

<span style=

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">

point = ConstructPoint3D(x, y, z);</span></span></p>

zAware.ZAware = <span style="COLOR: blue">true</span>;</span></p>

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>

PointCount

The number of points in the collection.

int PointCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

AddPoint(IPoint, ref object, ref object) 

void AddPoint(IPoint inPoint, ref object before, ref object after)

Parameters

inPoint IPoint
before object
after object

AddPointCollection(IPointCollection) 

void AddPointCollection(IPointCollection newPoints)

Parameters

newPoints IPointCollection

AddPoints(int, ref IPoint)

Adds copies of the input points as vertices to this Path, Ring, Polyline, or Polygon; or references to the input points to this Multipoint, TriangleFan, or TriangleStrip. This method is intended for internal use only.

void AddPoints(int Count, ref IPoint newPoints)

Parameters

Count int
newPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddWKSPoints(int, ref WKSPoint) 

void AddWKSPoints(int Count, ref WKSPoint pointStructures)

Parameters

Count int
pointStructures WKSPoint

InsertPointCollection(int, IPointCollection) 

void InsertPointCollection(int Index, IPointCollection newPoints)

Parameters

Index int
newPoints IPointCollection

InsertPoints(int, int, ref IPoint)

Inserts copies of the input points as vertices into a Path, Ring, Polyline, or Polygon; or references to the input points into a Multipoint, TriangleFan, or TriangleStrip. This method is intended for internal use only.

void InsertPoints(int Index, int Count, ref IPoint newPoints)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
newPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

InsertWKSPoints(int, int, ref WKSPoint) 

void InsertWKSPoints(int Index, int Count, ref WKSPoint newPoints)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
newPoints WKSPoint

QueryPoint(int, IPoint) 

void QueryPoint(int Index, IPoint Point)

Parameters

Index int
Point IPoint

QueryPoints(int, int, ref IPoint)

Copies some points to an existing array of points. This method is intended for internal use only.

void QueryPoints(int Index, int Count, ref IPoint Points)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
Points IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryWKSPoints(int, int, out WKSPoint) 

void QueryWKSPoints(int Index, int Count, out WKSPoint pointStructures)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
pointStructures WKSPoint

RemovePoints(int, int)

Removes vertices from a Path, Ring, Polyline, or Polygon, or references to points from a Multipoint, TriangleFan, or TriangleStrip.

void RemovePoints(int Index, int Count)

Parameters

Index int
Count int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplacePointCollection(int, int, IPointCollection) 

void ReplacePointCollection(int Index, int goingAway, IPointCollection newPoints)

Parameters

Index int
goingAway int
newPoints IPointCollection

ReplacePoints(int, int, int, ref IPoint)

Replaces vertices/points within a PointCollection.

void ReplacePoints(int Index, int comingIn, int goingAway, ref IPoint newPoints)

Parameters

Index int
comingIn int
goingAway int
newPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetPointCollection(IPointCollection) 

void SetPointCollection(IPointCollection newPoints)

Parameters

newPoints IPointCollection

SetPoints(int, ref IPoint)

Replaces all existing vertices of this Path, Ring, Polyline, or Polygon with copies of the input points; or all existing points of this Multipoint, TriangleFan, or TriangleStrip with references to the input points (for C++ and VB users only).

void SetPoints(int Count, ref IPoint newPoints)

Parameters

Count int
newPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetWKSPoints(int, ref WKSPoint) 

void SetWKSPoints(int Count, ref WKSPoint pointStructures)

Parameters

Count int
